# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - global
      - security
      - cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
        - https://portal.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Correlation-ID
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Correlation-ID
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - global
      - security
      - throttling
    config:
      minute: 500
      hour: 10000
      policy: local
      limit_by: ip
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - global
      - security
      - auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-service.internal:8080
    tags:
      - backend
      - users
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service
          - users
          - cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Request-ID
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-ID
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service
          - users
          - throttling
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

      - name: jwt
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service
          - users
          - auth
        config:
          uri_param_names:
            - jwt
          cookie_names: []
          key_claim_name: iss
          secret_is_base64: false
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          run_on_preflight: false

    routes:
      - name: users-public-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/users
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        tags:
          - users
          - public
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - users
              - cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-ID
              credentials: true
              max_age: 1800
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - users
              - throttling
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 1000
              policy: local
              limit_by: ip
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: users-admin-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/admin/users
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        tags:
          - users
          - admin
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - admin
              - cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Admin-Token
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-ID
              credentials: true
              max_age: 600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - admin
              - throttling
            config:
              minute: 50
              hour: 500
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

          - name: oauth2
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - admin
              - auth
            config:
              scopes:
                - admin
              mandatory_scope: true
              enable_authorization_code: true
              enable_client_credentials: true
              enable_implicit_grant: false
              enable_password_grant: false
              token_expiration: 7200
              accept_http_if_already_terminated: true
              anonymous: null
              global_credentials: false

  - name: payments-service
    url: http://payments-service.internal:8080
    tags:
      - backend
      - payments
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service
          - payments
          - cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://portal.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - Idempotency-Key
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-ID
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service
          - payments
          - throttling
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        tags:
          - service
          - payments
          - auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - x-api-key
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        tags:
          - payments
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - payments
              - cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://portal.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - Idempotency-Key
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-ID
              credentials: true
              max_age: 1800
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - payments
              - throttling
            config:
              minute: 80
              hour: 800
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

          - name: jwt
            enabled: true
            tags:
              - route
              - payments
              - auth
            config:
              uri_param_names:
                - jwt
              cookie_names: []
              key_claim_name: iss
              secret_is_base64: false
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
              run_on_preflight: false
